subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful servant of the Sacred Threshold! A sufficient answer was written to the first letter. In truth, the contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق آستان مقدس نامه اول را جواب کافی مرقوم گردید فی الحقیقه مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
